confluence.label: Confluence focus
confluence.plan_line: Confluence for wiki spaces, pages, and curated internal documentation.
confluence.base_notes: Search Confluence spaces and pages (CQL search), read page content, history, and comments via the Atlassian remote MCP server. Good for curated docs, runbooks, RFCs, and decision records. Read-only is enforced by a view-only Atlassian account (see SETUP.md) — the server itself has no read-only flag; never create, edit, or comment on pages.
